honesty.conjecture: This is a GENERATED, OPEN conjecture — NOT a theorem and NOT machine-verified. It remains OPEN until a solution is independently verified.
honesty.difficulty: Difficulty 'open-resistant' / grade 'OPEN' come from a REAL bounded solver run. OPEN means searched-to-budget, not proven true; VERIFIED-FINITE certifies only the finite enumerated domain; REFUTED carries a concrete witness. No score is fabricated.
honesty.novelty: Novelty verdict 'novel-candidate' is an advisory screen, not a proof of originality; external prior-art sources are labelled live/cached/unreachable and an unreachable source never confirms novelty.
honesty.signing: Disclosure is cosign keyless-OIDC signed and anchored into the szl-lake DSSE Khipu ledger; the signature attests the timestamp + content, NOT the truth of the conjecture.

candidate.intended_solution_outline:
Bound the orbit by a Lyapunov / drift argument on the 2-adic valuation: show the
contracting branch (n = 3 mod 4) dominates the accelerating branch (n = 1 mod 4)
in expectation, then rule out non-trivial cycles via a residue-class descent.
Status: OPEN — no proof is claimed; the predicate only performs bounded testing.

predicate.description: Sound bounded-orbit checker: returns False only on a detected non-1 cycle (a certain counterexample); inconclusive bounded runs assert no counterexample.

references: Lagarias, J. (2010). The 3x+1 problem: an annotated bibliography.
candidate.statement:
Define M : Z+ -> Z+ by
    M(n) = n / 2          if n is even,
    M(n) = (3n + 1) / 2    if n is odd and n = 1 (mod 4),
    M(n) = (n + 1) / 2     if n is odd and n = 3 (mod 4).
Conjecture: for every integer n >= 1 there exists k >= 0 with M^k(n) = 1.
candidate.statement_canonical: Define M : Z+ -> Z+ by M(n) = n / 2 if n is even, M(n) = (3n + 1) / 2 if n is odd and n = 1 (mod 4), M(n) = (n + 1) / 2 if n is odd and n = 3 (mod 4). Conjecture: for every integer n >= 1 there exists k >= 0 with M^k(n) = 1.
candidate.title: SZL mixing-map convergence conjecture

grade.honesty: Grade from a REAL ensemble run. REFUTED carries a concrete witness. VERIFIED-FINITE certifies only the finite enumerated domain, not the conjecture in general. OPEN means searched-to-budget with no counterexample — NOT a proof of truth. The candidate stays OPEN (doctrine v11).
